title: schoenus achaetus
intro: Schoenus achaetus, also known as the swamp sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Schoenus achaetus are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. In herbal preparations, Schoenus achaetus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its potential health benefits.
